meta.source: ui-ux-pro-max --design-system output, adapted per design-system.md. Amendment 1: olive-green + warm-gold re-palette + density. Amendment 2 (Tatreez Modern — Palestinian carte, from a design-direction panel + cultural-authenticity/truthfulness guard): editorial Fraunces + IBM Plex Sans typography, deep-forest headings, warm parchment bands, and a Palestinian tatreez (najmet Beit Lahm cross-stitch) motif — gold-on-forest on the hero hem + footer, olive on light dividers/ticks. Green+gold identity, green canvas, and kabab-skewer logo all KEPT (refinement, not rebrand).
meta.note: Standalone token set; owner brand assets unconfirmed. NOT a Figma/design-token sync handoff. Build reference for Phase 4 tokens.css. Arabic (ahlan wa sahlan anchor + Naskh dish names) is specced but SHIPS HIDDEN behind an enableArabic flag until owner Ray Aqel verifies script/diacritics. Madder/sumac red DEFERRED (owner-gated: green+red+white flag risk + madder-on-forest only 2.28:1).
meta.brandAssetStatus: Logo: gold kabab-skewer-on-green-circle icon + Fraunces 'Pita Kabab' wordmark + 'Palestinian kitchen · Cedar Rapids' tagline (public/logo-icon.png). Owner-confirm/replace pending.

motif.name: Palestinian tatreez — najmet Beit Lahm (Bethlehem eight-point star) + saw-tooth running stitch
motif.authoredAs: inline SVG on a counted 4px grid (src/components/TatreezBand.astro); monochrome via currentColor
motif.placements: gold-on-forest saw hem on the hero + CTA banner + footer top (7.13:1); olive single-tone star dividers between home sections (5.99:1); olive running-stitch tick under section h2s; olive stitch bullet on eyebrows
motif.discipline: structural ornament only — never a field, button, or text; every node aria-hidden; not the sole signal for anything

contrast.onAccentVsAccent: 6.9:1 (AA — dark ink #1C2B21 on gold #E0A80D; white is NEVER placed on gold)
contrast.onAccentSoftVsAccentSoft: >=8:1 (dark ink on pale gold eyebrow/badge fill)
contrast.policy: WCAG AA floor: 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text and UI glyphs; gold is an accent/surface color used only with dark ink, never as text-on-white and never carrying white text; never color-alone meaning

display.usage: H1-H3, dish names, italic menu descriptors; variable optical sizing; display-only, never body/UI

arabic.usage: DRAFT/GATED — ahlan wa sahlan anchor + Naskh dish names; ships hidden until owner sign-off

typography.amendment2Note: Retired Fredoka + Nunito. Fraunces (editorial serif) + IBM Plex Sans reads professional/carte; owner Google Fonts css2 URL validated 200.
typography.loading: font-display: swap; preload Fredoka 600 and Nunito 400 only
typography.deviation: Generated Caveat/Quicksand pairing rejected (script headings fail legibility/hierarchy at h1 scale on a conversion site)

shape.buttonDepth: 4px solid darker bottom edge (#14512E), collapses 2px on press via transform

elevation.policy: flat-with-definition; hairline borders over heavy shadows (Polaris)

spacing.densityNote: Amendment 1 tightened section rhythm (was 48/80 mobile/desktop) to 32/48 and container padding to 20/24px to remove the sparse-whitespace feel flagged by the engagement owner. Full-bleed brand hero band replaces the empty cream hero to anchor the top of the page.

layout.approach: mobile-first single column; full-bleed brand hero band, then card-on-canvas sections with alternating pale-gold/section-tinted bands to break up long white stretches
layout.sectionRhythm: 32px mobile / 48px desktop between top-level sections; sections group visually via background bands instead of large empty gaps

motion.signature: single spring bounce on primary CTA press only
motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion drops bounce and scroll-reveals, keeps state feedback

components.ctaButton: chunky 3D: primary green fill, 4px primaryEdge bottom edge, 48px min height, pill-to-14px radius
components.stickyCallBar: singleton fixed bottom, 56px + safe-area inset, single-CTA default (Call), dual variant gated on SMS confirmation
components.badge: pill, accentSoft (pale gold) fill with dark ink, or success fill with white text, icon + text (never color alone)
components.eyebrow: small-caps gold-ink label over accentSoft chip introducing sections; adds density and hierarchy without imagery
components.heroBand: full-bleed green band, white h1 + subhead + gold underline accent + primary CTA; anchors the top instead of empty cream
components.banner: full-width green announcement/CTA band with gold accent underline and a white (surface) CTA button reading green
components.card: surface white, radiusCard 18px, hairline sage border, card elevation; sits on green-tinted canvas
components.sectionBand: alternating pale-gold (#FBF3D6) or white bands full-bleed behind grouped sections to reduce perceived whitespace
components.trustGrid: 2-col mobile / 3-col desktop cards; conditional >=6 owner-confirmed facts, omitted otherwise
components.leadForm: <=6 fields, visible labels, blur validation, error below field, 44px+ inputs, semantic input types
components.icons: Lucide SVG, 1.5px stroke, no emoji icons
